send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately if cx did not receive their order
Send to CS immediately for post purchase inquiries about the status of the mold, or issues with the molds
Send to CS for pricing inquiries
Send to CS if cx is looking for a more specific piece not available on the website
Send to CS if cx is asking for a code and we don't have one
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Use Teeth instead of Pieces (e.g 8 teeth at the top)
templates: If the image is not coming through a second time, send Broken Image temp
For CUSTOM GRILLZ & ACCESSORIES INQUIRIES for models not available on the website use PS shortcut
For urgent concerns/delayed escalation response use PS shortcut
For delayed orders and the customer is frustrated use PS shortcut
For customer service use shortcut CS which has both the direct email/number
dos_and_donts: Do not use the order history as a reference to order status
If customers want to cancel their order always ask for the reason for cancellation
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend pre-made grillz! Upsell to fitted and custom grillz
When recommending an item, let the cx know they can customize their order on the product page
When recommending an item, ask the cx if they are working with a budget
Use LFG shortcut to gather information and provide recommendations when cx ask about:

Template used: "Do you offer financing?"; last updated: 2024-02-19 15:49:13.328

Custom Gold Grillz: Thanks for reaching out! I don't have any info on any upcoming Father's Day sale, but as an SMS subscriber, you'll be the first to know about our future deals, so keep an eye out! Please know that we are partnered with Affirm, Klarna, and Shop Pay. Affirm offers equal monthly payments split into 3, 6, or 12 months. Klarna and Shop Pay, allow you to split your payment into 4 interest-free installments paid bi-weekly over 4 weeks. When you reach the checkout page, choose among the three as your payment provider and it will prompt you to prequalify, you will know right away how much you need to put down or the amount you need to pay per month. Once you're qualified, we will mail you the free mold kits so you can do your molds at home and mail your teeth impressions back for production. The finished piece will be sent to you once we're done so you can wear it while making payments. 

Lastly, If you're having issues with approval, we do have the layaway option available. You can check out how it works here: https://customgoldgrillz.attn.tv/sl/W8FALQPr The gist of it is you can lock in the price of your piece and you just have to put in a 10% initial deposit. Best thing about this is no approval or assessments required and it is interest free. You have the flexibility on how much and when you can for the remaining amount (up to 365 days depending on the amount of your order). We'll start the process and send you the molding kits once you're able to pay off 75% of the total order.

Lastly, if you're not quite sure what to get yet, check out our bestsellers! These include our most popular grillz designs, known for their quality and style. You can explore our top picks here: https://customgoldgrillz.attn.tv/sl/QToj0eYg. Let me know if you have any questions or need further assistance!
